summary: Iteration 1 closed successfully. All 11 user stories (US-1-1 through US-1-11) delivered and accepted. 15 screens redesigned with design-system tokens. 47 color literals replaced. 2 design-system primitives created (AppEventBadge, DocumentSlotPill). ~140 l10n keys added. PR #13 merged. Quality gates: dart analyze 0 errors/0 warnings, flutter test 28 pass/4 pre-existing fail (unchanged). No new test failures, no new lint violations. All 6 close-out documents written.

artifacts.description: Iteration 1 executive summary with goal, stories delivered, design system artifacts, metrics, quality gates, key findings, and next-iteration dependencies
Chronological record of completed iterations; appended iter-1 row with date, goal, and link to ITERATION_SUMMARY_1.md
Current shipped capabilities across all features; updated 'What's Shipped' section to reflect iter-1 design-system baseline; lists planned iter-2 through iter-1 features

Bridge document for iter-2; summarizes what iter-1 left (design system complete, no regressions, stale .g.dart files), what was NOT changed (backend, domain, data, DI), and pre-flight checklist for iter-2 (Prisma setup, code generation, design gate)
Updated project root README: changed 'Latest Iteration' link from iter-4 to iter-1; added 'Previous Iterations' link to ITERATION_HISTORY.md
Reset to idle state; marked 'Last closed: Iteration 1 (2026-05-14)'; all 10 phases marked as done
Updated: iterations[id=1].status set to 'done'; agents.po.status set to 'idle'; appended phase_complete event with type='phase_complete', iteration=1, phase='po_close', agent='po'
Phase contract for po_close with iteration, phase, status, updatedAt, summary, metrics, artifacts[], and qualityGates[]
Appended [po_close] phase completion note to po-skill.md documenting this session's close-out work
